headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Church & Dwight (CHD) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Church & Dwight at around US$92.89 is offering value right now, or if the price already reflects what they might expect from the stock. The stock is up 12.4% year to date, even though it is flat over the past month and has declined 5.5% over the last year. This can change how investors think about both upside potential and risk. Recent attention on Church & Dwight has focused on its role within the Household Products sector and how its share price compares with...
